_meta.brand: جريشة (Jureish Al-Riyadh) — traditional Najdi / Saudi home food, delivery cloud kitchen

grounding.vision: clients/eatjurisha/profile/media_class.json clean product_food references (DV63TOKDCmy, DV6od-KjAk4, DWFL8-wjPCJ, DV6mMArDDq4, DWmCb6-jAly, DXW5KvBDFpe)
grounding.web: WebSearch of the brand's real menu + traditional Najdi dish forms (jareesh = cracked-wheat porridge, qursan = soaked flatbread, saleeg = milk-rice, etc.)

_meta.keys_source: truth_pack.product_candidates (Mohamed-confirmed: جريش, رز كابلي, سليق, تمن, باشميل, قرصان)
_meta.hard_truth: جريش is a CRACKED-WHEAT PORRIDGE served in a real vessel — NEVER a fried crust/chicken. This brand is Najdi home food, not fried chicken.
_meta.signature_serving_system: Branded RED box + white kraft cup (single) OR round aluminum-foil tray (family حجم عائلي); two clear condiment pots (chunky red roasted-pepper/tomato salsa + dark amber ghee/سمن); gold eight-point-star logo lid stamped جريشة. Photographed on Najdi/Persian woven carpet or palm-frond mat, with red chilies, lemon, dukkah side bowls, gold spoon. Jahez/HungerStation delivery.

جريش.identity_dna: A thick, creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge, slow-cooked to a smooth oatmeal-like consistency and glistening with a pour of dark amber ghee (سمن). It is crowned with a vivid scarlet roasted-pepper-and-tomato salsa and whole red chilies, served either in a single white kraft cup or a round family-size aluminum-foil tray nested in the brand's signature red box.
components: cracked whole wheat (جريش) cooked to creamy porridge
roasted red pepper + tomato salsa (كشنة / صلصة محمّرة)
side pot of dark spiced ghee-sauce
side pot of chunky red dukkah/salsa
جريش.signature: Creamy pale-gold porridge crown of red roasted-pepper salsa + whole red chili, with ghee gloss — in the red box with the gold star-logo lid
جريش.texture: Thick, creamy, smooth porridge — soft and spoonable like rich oatmeal, glossy with ghee on top; NEVER crispy, fried, or crusted

رز كابلي.identity_dna: A white kraft cup heaped with spiced golden-orange kabuli rice — long-grain rice stained warm amber with tomato and Najdi spices — topped with deeply browned, roasted bone-in chicken pieces. It rides on the brand's red box flanked by a pot of creamy white garlic-yogurt sauce and a pot of red chili paste, under the gold star-logo lid.
components: spiced kabuli rice (long-grain, tomato + warm spices)
رز كابلي.signature: Mound of golden-amber spiced rice topped with caramel-browned roasted chicken, in the red box with the gold star-logo lid
رز كابلي.texture: Fluffy separate-grain rice, oil-glossed; chicken with crisp burnished skin and tender meat

سليق.identity_dna: A soft, creamy white rice dish — short rice slow-simmered in milk and meat broth until it turns soupy and pudding-soft, pale ivory and almost porridge-like — mounded in a white kraft cup or family tray and topped with a piece of tender stewed lamb or chicken, often finished with a glossy ghee drizzle.
components: short/medium rice simmered in milk + broth
tender stewed lamb or chicken on top
سليق.signature: Pale ivory creamy milk-rice, pudding-soft, crowned with a piece of stewed meat
سليق.texture: Very soft, creamy, almost soupy — moist and spoonable, not dry or separate-grain

تمن (رز أبيض).identity_dna: Plain steamed long-grain white rice — clean snowy-white, fluffy, separate glossy grains — served as the simple base in a white kraft cup or family tray, the unadorned counterpart to the brand's richer dishes.
تمن (رز أبيض).signature: Clean, snowy-white fluffy rice with distinct separate grains
تمن (رز أبيض).texture: Fluffy, dry, light, separate steamed grains

باشميل.identity_dna: A baked layered pasta comfort dish — penne or macaroni bound in a creamy golden béchamel over a savory spiced minced-meat layer, baked until the top sets into a burnished golden crust, then portioned into the brand's kraft cup or aluminum-foil tray for delivery.
باشميل.signature: Golden baked béchamel crust over creamy pasta with a hidden spiced-meat layer
باشميل.texture: Creamy and soft inside under a set golden-baked top; tender pasta in rich sauce

قرصان.identity_dna: Thin whole-wheat flatbread (رقاق خبز قرصان) torn into pieces and layered in a deep dish, then drowned in a rich brown meat-and-vegetable broth until the bread softens and soaks it up — topped with chunks of stewed lamb or chicken and softened carrots, potato and onion, served family-style in the brand's foil tray.
قرصان.signature: Layers of broth-soaked thin flatbread under stewed meat and broth vegetables — a rustic Najdi tharid-style dish
قرصان.texture: Soft, broth-soaked tender bread (silky, not crisp) with tender meat and soft vegetables in a saucy stew

لازانيا.identity_dna: A baked lasagna in the Najdi comfort-food register — wide pasta sheets layered with spiced minced-meat ragu and creamy béchamel, baked to a bubbling golden top, then portioned into the brand's foil tray for delivery.
لازانيا.signature: Bubbling golden-baked cheese top over visible layers of pasta, meat sauce and béchamel
لازانيا.texture: Soft layered pasta in rich sauce under a set bubbly golden crust
